name: Benton Pickleball Courts
description: Benton Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Benton, KY. There are 6 outdoor asphalt and acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts. Players have access to lights and restrooms.
open_play_schedule: Currently, there is open play Tuesday, Thursday and Saturday but a firm schedule has not been set. Either Message "https://www.facebook.com/BentonCity" thru Facebook or email rdotson@cityofbenton.org for current information.

name: Calvert City First Baptist Church
description: We have two, just renovated, indoor courts stripped on the basketball courts. We have an active group of about 50 with 12 - 16 playing daily. Weather permitting, we play outdoors on public courts so contact before coming at the email address ihhome400@gmail.com. There are no fees at this time. For long term players, we request a "chip in" for equipment costs.

name: Calvert City Pickleball Courts
description: Calvert City has added four more brand new dedicated permanent courts. They are located in Doctors Park next to the existing four for a total of eight courts. Go to 23 Park Rd, Calvert City, Ky 42029. Then continue on Park Rd past basketball courts. Turn right into the Skate Park lot. The courts are lighted. There are restaurants nearby. Contact ihhome400@gmail.com to get current scheduled play times. We are on Facebook at Calvert City Pickleball.

name: Calvert City Tennis Courts
description: Calvert City Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Calvert City, KY. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: East Marshall Baptist Church
description: This is a brand new dedicated Pickleball court. It is operated by the East Marshall Baptist Church. It is open to the public but must be reserved through the Church Website. https://www.eastmarshallbaptistchurch.com/. At top of the page select Activities. Scroll down to get the Registration form and further to read the Rules for the Court. Rest rooms are available at nearby restaurants.

name: Mike Miller County Park
description:
Our courts have been resurfaced and are now dually lined for tennis AND pickleball! We will have the courts set up for pickleball on Tuesdays and Thursdays with 4 courts available. Pickleball paddles and balls are available in the visitors center and may be checked out for use at no charge M-F from 8-4:30 (A driver's license must be left at the office and will be returned when the equipment is brought back.)

Contact parks@marshallcountyky.gov for more information.
